name: agent-os-toolkit
description: Agent OS MCP-style tools for orchestration, animation evidence, protocol linting, self-tests, and scorecards.

tools.name: agent_os.orchestrate
tools.description: Run the base meta-orchestrator and generate orchestration reports.

tools.name: agent_os.orchestrate_super
tools.description: Run the supercharged meta-orchestrator with risk scoring and claim extraction.

tools.name: agent_os.lint_protocols
tools.description: Run protocol linter over Agent OS markdown files.

tools.name: agent_os.score
tools.description: Generate Agent OS scorecard from reports.

tools.name: agent_os.validate_reports
tools.description: Validate required report artifacts and score thresholds.
